description: Create comprehensive EXPERIMENT.md document capturing the experimental design, methodology, actors, meta-prompting strategy, issue history, and observations from this TDD IaC project. Then link it prominently from README.md.
steps: Create EXPERIMENT.md at the repository root with the following sections: Overview & Goals, Experimental Setup (5 languages x 3 AIs matrix), Methodology (TDD, issue-driven development, architecture-as-code with Mermaid), Actors & Setup (Kiro + TypeScript flavor, obstreperous-ai as project owner), Prompting Patterns & Meta-Prompts (reference META-PROMPTS.md, describe the 5-discipline framework, discipline blocks in issues), Issue History Summary (table of all 14 issues with their GitHub numbers, titles, key outcomes, test counts, and merge dates), Key Decisions & Trade-offs (serverless event-driven, Step Functions orchestration, two-layer validation, SNS dual topics, exponential backoff, X-Ray tracing), and Preliminary Observations (strengths, challenges, testing insights, architecture fitness).

The document should be comprehensive, objective, and serve as a foundation for final evaluation of the experiment. Use data from the merged PRs: 12 PRs merged over June 1-13 2026, 196 tests produced, 100% resource coverage, conventional commits throughout.

Include a section describing the actor for this repo: Kiro (AI coding agent) operating as a Senior AWS CDK TypeScript TDD Specialist, with the TypeScript language flavor. Note this is one cell in a 5-language x 3-AI experimental matrix.
Document the iterative compounding approach: each issue built on verified output of previous issues, no large rewrites, regressions caught immediately by existing test suite.
Add a link to EXPERIMENT.md in README.md Table of Contents and add a brief reference in the existing Experiment Methodology section pointing readers to EXPERIMENT.md for the full design document.
Run npm test and npx cdk synth --context environment=dev to confirm no regressions from documentation changes.
acceptance_criteria: EXPERIMENT.md exists at repository root with all required sections: Overview & Goals, Experimental Setup, Methodology, Actors & Setup, Prompting Patterns, Issue History Summary, Key Decisions & Trade-offs, Preliminary Observations
README.md links to EXPERIMENT.md prominently (in Table of Contents and Experiment Methodology section)
All internal markdown links resolve correctly
npm test passes without changes to test count (196 tests)
verification: Run: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage (expect 196 tests pass)
Run: npx cdk synth --context environment=dev (expect success)
Verify EXPERIMENT.md exists and contains all required section headings
Verify README.md contains a link to EXPERIMENT.md
